name: Hive Tax AI
oneliner: AI-powered tax planning platform for high-net-worth individuals and tax professionals with agentic workflow automation
finserv: Direct finserv product — tax planning, multi-state income, automated tax-loss harvesting; targets HNW and tax professionals
thesis: Hive Tax AI demonstrates agentic AI applied to tax optimisation — a high-value automation that directly impacts investor returns. As You's agents handle portfolio management, tax-aware execution becomes critical.
